title: hieracium subhirtum
intro: Hieracium subhirtum, also known as rough hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subhirtum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Hieracium subhirtum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
